summary: Harden Validator-B pipeline from combined review findings.

spec.title: Harden Validator-B pipeline after combined review
spec.objective: Fix Validator-B pipeline design gaps identified by Codex and Claude reviews, add regression tests/audit gates, run validation, and write a formal report.
scope: Replace line-count event id generation with max-suffix generation in Validator runners and add ledger duplicate event_id detection.
Record malformed Gemini output as RESOURCE_FAILURE instead of unlogged process failure.
Strengthen Validator-B independence prompt and guard rails against Validator-A/Codex artifact references in embedded context.
Correct Validator-B approval metadata from approval_policy=never to approval_mode=plan and remove dead code.
Add behavior-based audit coverage for Validator-B command shape and runner invariants.
Add negative Validator-B smoke fixture or parser-level test to prove FAIL output path and errors[] validation.
Update authority/guide docs where actual Gemini plan-mode behavior differs from prior sandbox wording.
Write final report and quality score, then run Validator-A before merge.
success_criteria: Regression coverage detects duplicate ledger event_id and malformed Validator-B output handling.
Validator-A PASS is recorded before main merge.
reports/TASK-20260430-005.md and quality score are written.
constraints: Do not record secrets, tokens, credentials, PII, or environment variable values.
Keep changes scoped to harness pipeline, docs, tests, logs, and reports.

next_action: Create task branch and implement fixes.
